creator: bde@zeta.org.au
text:
>>Description:
>
>cd /usr/src
>make cleandepend
>
>===> share/doc/usd/30.rogue
>make: don't know how to make cleandepend. Stop
>*** Error code 2

It's more games breakage.  The Makefile uses the correct test for
/usr/src/games, but if this directory doesn't exist, then it uses
a deficient set of private rules instead of including bsd.doc.mk.
There is no rule for at least `cleandepend'.

Bruce
